value.0: Blue Dragons are vain and territorial. They prefer to hunt on cloudless days, when their blue scales allow them to blend with the open skies.
Blessed by Paladine himself this armor was forged by Theros Ironfeld in his last days before passing on.
Glorious to behold is this finely crafted plate armor.

Feryl Dragonhunter was a monster of a man who, with four kills to his credit, thought he had perfected the art of dragon slaying. He aided his efforts by creating magical equipment from his previous victories, including several different boots he mockingly called his Dragon Slippers. Amazingly, Feryl was not defeated by his preferred enemy, but was surprised by a small band of goblins on his way to a hunt.
This Talisman of Paladin was only awarded to those soldiers of light who reached the highest order of Avatar.
A Glowing Talisman with a Silver symbol of Paladine.
Elder Robes of the Enabled Hand
The essense of an Ice Drakeis a potent force indeed. But you do not possess the lore to combine it.
Strange runes and pictographs, likely arcane in nature, have been scorched into the sides of this hide-covered strongbox.
